text:
[
  {
    "thinking": "The video begins with a white screen as the Mortgage Choice 'Compare home loans' page starts to load. By 1450ms, the hero section with the primary interest rate cards is fully rendered.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 0,
    "time_end_ms": 1450,
    "description": "The Mortgage Choice 'Compare home loans' page finishes loading its initial hero section view.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The hero section of the 'Compare home loans' page is visible, displaying fixed and comparison rates."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Following the initial load, the lower portion of the page containing the search filters and the first set of loan results appears on the screen.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 6350,
    "time_end_ms": 7600,
    "description": "The loan comparison filters and the initial list of loan results load into the viewport.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "Filters for loan purpose, property value, and loan amount appear above a list of home loan products."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user switches browser tabs. Optical flow data at 14825ms confirms a horizontal shift, and the video shows the 'Askable | Explore' page.",
    "type": "navigate",
    "time_start_ms": 14825,
    "time_end_ms": 15550,
    "description": "User switches from the Mortgage Choice tab to the Askable Explore tab.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "page_title": "Askable | Explore",
    "frame_description": "The Askable dashboard is visible, showing various research tasks and surveys."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Immediately after viewing the Askable tab, the user switches to another tab containing the task instructions for the current user testing session.",
    "type": "navigate",
    "time_start_ms": 15850,
    "time_end_ms": 16000,
    "description": "User switches to the tab containing the task instructions.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "A page with text instructions for searching and evaluating home loan options is displayed."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "After reviewing the instructions, the user switches back to the Mortgage Choice tab. Optical flow at 26825ms confirms the tab switch.",
    "type": "navigate",
    "time_start_ms": 26825,
    "time_end_ms": 27800,
    "description": "User switches back to the Mortgage Choice 'Compare home loans' tab.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "page_title": "Compare home loans | Mortgage Choice",
    "frame_description": "The user returns to the loan comparison results page on the Mortgage Choice website."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user begins scrolling down the list of loan products to explore more options. Optical flow at 30325ms confirms the upward motion of content.",
    "type": "scroll",
    "time_start_ms": 30325,
    "time_end_ms": 31325,
    "description": "User scrolls down the list of home loan products.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The list of loan cards moves upwards as the user scrolls down the page."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user identifies a loan from CBA and clicks the 'View details' button to see more information. The cursor movement in the video confirms the target.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 36500,
    "time_end_ms": 36600,
    "description": "User clicks on the 'View details' button for the CBA home loan.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "View details",
    "frame_description": "The user clicks the 'View details' button on a specific loan card for Commonwealth Bank."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Clicking 'View details' triggers a page navigation to the specific details page for that loan product.",
    "type": "navigate",
    "time_start_ms": 36600,
    "time_end_ms": 37500,
    "description": "Page navigates to the specific details page for the CBA home loan.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "page_title": "CBA MAV Fixed | OO P&I | $150k + | HGS Only Home Loan | Mortgage Choice",
    "frame_description": "A new page loads showing detailed information, features, and fees for the selected CBA loan."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves the cursor to the top navigation menu and pauses over 'Calculators'. Cursor tracking data confirms the stationary position at (1520.6, 385.4) from 48525ms to 49525ms.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 48525,
    "time_end_ms": 49525,
    "description": "User hovers over the 'Calculators' menu item in the main navigation.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Calculators",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is positioned over the 'Calculators' link in the header navigation bar."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user scrolls down the details page and hovers over the 'Home loans from other lenders' section to compare options.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 49858,
    "time_end_ms": 50725,
    "description": "User hovers over the 'Home loans from other lenders' section.",
    "confidence": 0.7,
    "frame_description": "The cursor is in the lower section of the page where alternative loan options are displayed."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks the small 'i' information icon next to the 'Comparison rate' label to understand how it is calculated. Cursor data shows movement to the icon position (680.5, 536.0) just before this time.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 68150,
    "time_end_ms": 68250,
    "description": "User clicks the information icon next to 'Comparison rate'.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The cursor clicks a small information icon next to the comparison rate percentage."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Clicking the info icon opens a tooltip explaining the definition of a comparison rate.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 68200,
    "time_end_ms": 68650,
    "description": "A tooltip appears explaining the definition of a comparison rate.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "A small popup window with explanatory text about comparison rates is visible on the screen."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves the cursor away, and the tooltip closes.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 68650,
    "time_end_ms": 69000,
    "description": "The comparison rate tooltip closes.",
    "confidence": 0.8,
    "frame_description": "The explanatory popup window disappears from the view."
  }
]
